title: Disaster Declarations Information - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Disaster Declarations Information 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATURAL DISASTER RESOURCES HARNEY COUNTY MARCH 2025 FLOOD DAMAGE ASSESSMENT FORM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Harney County is seeking reports from residents whose homes or businesses were damaged in the March 2025 flood. Eligibility: Residents and business owners who experienced property loss or damage during the March 2025 flood Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details NATURAL DISASTER RESOURCES DOUGLAS COUNTY BUSINESS DAMAGE ASSESSMENT SURVEY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Douglas County is seeking reports from business owners, churches, or nonprofit organizations whose property was damaged in the recent flood that began on March 16, 2025. No damage is too minor to report. Eligibility: Business owners that experienced property damage during the March 2025 flood Hours: Not applicable Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
